data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: IDF to continue to attack Hezbollah in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire • IRGC commander declares ceasefire as Hezbollah's victory • All war restrictions to be lifted across Israel, IDF announces
